properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v3 v4 v4 v5 v6 v6 v6 v6 v7 v4 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh, This is the day You've made I'll rejoice and be glad with all that I am This is the day You've made I'll rejoice and be glad in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh, This is the day You've made And Your mercies are new, Your promises true This is the day You've made I'll rejoice and be glad in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a supernatural praise Rising up in my heart, up in my heart A sound that has to be made, O Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So my heart will sing You are good, You are good And with everything I will praise, I will praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh,

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: This is the day You've made So I will give You praise Whatever comes my way I'll rejoice in You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh, Whoa. O. ooh,
